failures.description: The agent fabricated a cheapest product and price instead of using the ProductCatalogSearch result.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call at index 3 returned sorted available items, with the cheapest item being item_id 1240311797 at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer claiming item 0000000000 costs $0.01. That item_id and price are absent from all prior user input and tool output, and the agent relied on the invented values as the final answer.
